content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Applied all 4 pending amendments: (1) unified stderr truncation to STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT (512 bytes) across all failure paths — envelope parse, result parse, and exit-failure — replacing hardcoded 200-byte limits in schema-validation paths; (2) removed the 500-byte truncation on runtime log error messages in engine.rs so the full AppError (which is already bounded by STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT at the process_backend layer) reaches run.ndjson without being clipped; (3) added stdout_len/stderr_len to both non-zero-exit error detail format strings so raw output sizes are always visible in runtime log stage_failed entries; (4) propagated --verbose to the stale-session retry path by bumping attempt_number on the cloned fresh_request before rebuilding the command.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Replace hardcoded 200-byte stderr truncation with STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT (512) in the Claude envelope parse failure path (process_backend.rs line ~154)
2. [Completed] Replace hardcoded 200-byte stderr truncation with STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT (512) in the Claude result JSON parse failure path (process_backend.rs line ~201)
3. [Completed] Remove truncate_to_char_boundary import and 500-byte truncation from engine.rs runtime log stage_failed entry; write error.to_string() directly via Display (error is already bounded at the source by STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT)
4. [Completed] Add stdout_len/stderr_len to the stale-session-retry non-zero-exit error detail format string (process_backend.rs line ~1520)
5. [Completed] Add stdout_len/stderr_len to the primary non-zero-exit error detail format string (process_backend.rs line ~1555)
6. [Completed] Bump fresh_request.attempt_number via saturating_add(1) before build_command in the stale-session retry path so --verbose is enabled on the internal retry
7. [Completed] Run cargo fmt, cargo test (756 pass + 1 pre-existing checkpoint failure), cargo clippy (0 new warnings), cargo fmt --check (clean)

## Validation Evidence

- 6 diagnostic tests pass: finish_claude_invalid_envelope_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr, finish_claude_invalid_result_json_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr, build_command_claude_omits_verbose_on_first_attempt, build_command_claude_includes_verbose_on_retry, finish_codex_invalid_last_message_includes_output_sizes, build_command_claude_schema_has_no_refs_or_definitions
- 590 lib tests pass (0 regressions)
- 756 total tests pass; 1 pre-existing failure in checkpoint_test (worktree_adapter_includes_workspace_in_checkpoint_commits — unrelated to changes)
- cargo fmt --check passes with no formatting issues
- cargo clippy shows 0 new warnings in modified files (engine.rs, process_backend.rs)

## Outstanding Risks

- Runtime log error messages are no longer truncated at the engine layer; message size is now bounded only by STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT (512 bytes) at the process_backend layer plus the AppError preamble — this is intentional per the amendment but means run.ndjson lines can be ~700 bytes for exit failures
- Codex CLI has no equivalent --verbose flag; transient Codex failures still rely on captured stderr and runtime/failed/*.failed.raw artifacts
- Bumping attempt_number on the stale-session retry changes the number reported in the InvocationFailed error from 1 to 2 for that internal retry path; this is cosmetic and only affects the error message, not engine retry accounting
